frameworks.name: citty
frameworks.rule: CLI output is allowed in src/api and src/cli; business/runtime libraries should use structured logging.

frameworks.name: pino
frameworks.rule: Runtime logs should use structured records and must not include raw secrets, tokens, credentials, cookies, or authorization headers.

frameworks.name: vitest
frameworks.rule: Behavior changes require focused regression tests before implementation and full-suite verification before release.

architecture.dependencyRule: CLI and adapters may depend on workflow services; workflow services should not depend on CLI output formatting.
